final:
module sr_flip_flop (
    input wire S,
    input wire R,
    input wire clk,
    output reg Q
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (S && !R) 
            Q <= 1; // Set
        else if (!S && R) 
            Q <= 0; // Reset
        // If S and R are both 0, Q remains unchanged
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (S && R) begin
        Q <= 0;
      end
      else if (!S && !R) begin
        Q <= 1;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
